Honda X-Adv 2021


2021 Honda X-Adv specifications, pictures, reviews and rating


 2021 Honda X-Adv . Picture credits - Honda. Submit more pictures.

  • Larger picture...

Honda's profilation of this bike
Our X-ADV made the first move. Broke the ground. And led the way. Combining the capabilities and performance of an adventure motorcycle, with the comfort, convenience and commuting ability of a large-capacity scooter, it’s a two-wheeled SUV that defies convention.

General information
Model name Honda X-Adv
Model year 2021
Category Allround
Rating 3.5  Check out the detailed rating of reliability, maintenance costs, value for money, etc. Compare with any other motorcycle.
Engine and transmission
Displacement 745.0 ccm (45.46 cubic inches)
Engine type V2, four-stroke
Power output 57.8 HP (42.2 kW)) @ 6000 RPM
Torque 69.0 Nm (7.0 kgf-m or 50.9 ft.lbs) @ 4000 RPM
Compression 10.7:1
Bore x stroke 77.0 x 80.0 mm (3.0 x 3.1 inches)
Fuel system Injection. PGM-FI
Fuel control Single Overhead Cams (SOHC)
Cooling system Liquid
Gearbox 6-speed
Transmission type Chain (final drive)
Clutch Wet multiplate Hydraulic Dual clutch (DCT)
Chassis, suspension, brakes and wheels
Frame type Steel diamond
Rake (fork angle) 27.0°
Trail 104 mm (4.1 inches)
Front suspension 41mm cartidge-type USD fork adjusts for spring preload and rebound damping
Rear suspension Prolink with Rear Shock Preload adjustment
Front tire 120/70-R17
Rear tire 160/60-R15
Front brakes Double disc. ABS
Diameter 296 mm (11.7 inches)
Rear brakes Single disc. ABS
Diameter 240 mm (9.4 inches)
Physical measures and capacities
Weight incl. oil, gas, etc 236.0 kg (520.3 pounds)
Seat height 820 mm (32.3 inches) If adjustable, lowest setting.
Overall height 1370 mm (53.9 inches)
Overall length 2215 mm (87.2 inches)
Overall width 940 mm (37.0 inches)
Ground clearance 165 mm (6.5 inches)
Wheelbase 1590 mm (62.6 inches)
Fuel capacity 13.20 litres (3.49 US gallons)
Oil capacity 4.00 litres (4.23 US quarts)
Other specifications
Color options Black Graphite, Gran Prix Red, Pearl Mud Grey
Starter Electric
Electrical 12V-11.2AH battery.
Light LED Headlights
Update specsReport missing specs or required updates.
Further information
Insurance costsCompare US insurance quotes from the nation's top providers.
MaintenanceFind parts, fluids. filters, maintenance tools and service manuals at Amazon.com.
Ask questionsJoin the 21 Honda X-Adv discussion group or the general Honda discussion group.
Related bikesList related bikes for comparison of specs.
